# Agentic DevOps CLI (LangGraph)

An autonomous CLI agent for DevOps engineers that executes complex tasks within a sandbox. It interprets goals from requirements.md, design.md, and tasks.md files, using a ReAct loop to perform actions while halting for human intervention upon failure.

## Guidance

Must operate within a sandbox environment. Uses a 'halt and signal' logic instead of self-correcting architectural specs. General-purpose DevOps focus.

## Tech Stack

LangGraph, Python
